executives.name: Scott Donnelly
executives.background: Mr. Donnelly has served as Chairman of the Board since September 2010 and as President and Chief Executive Officer since December 2009. He previously served as President and Chief Operating Officer from June 2008 to December 2009. Prior to joining Textron, he was President and CEO of GE Aviation.

tenure_dates.title: Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Frank Connor
executives.background: Mr. Connor has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since August 2009. Before joining Textron, he was Managing Director and Head of Consolidated Corporate Finance at Goldman, Sachs & Co.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Robert Lupone
executives.background: Mr. Lupone has served as Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Secretary since February 2012. Prior to joining Textron, he was Senior Vice President and General Counsel of Siemens Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Secretary

executives.name: Julie Duffy
executives.background: Ms. Duffy has served as Executive Vice President, Human Resources since July 2017. She previously served as Vice President and Deputy General Counsel from 2011 to 2017.

board_of_directors.name: Richard Ambrose
board_of_directors.background: Former Executive Vice President, Space of Lockheed Martin Corporation. He served in various leadership roles at Lockheed Martin from 2000 to 2022.

board_of_directors.name: Heather Arnet
board_of_directors.background: Chief Executive Officer of the Women's and Girls' Foundation. She has served in this role since 2004.

board_of_directors.name: Kerry Clark
board_of_directors.background: Retired Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Cardinal Health, Inc. Former Vice Chairman of the Board of The Procter & Gamble Company.

board_of_directors.name: James Conway
board_of_directors.background: Retired General, U.S. Marine Corps. Served as the 34th Commandant of the Marine Corps from 2006 to 2010.

board_of_directors.name: Scott Donnelly
board_of_directors.background: Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer of Textron Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Deborah Lee James
board_of_directors.background: Former Secretary of the Air Force. Former President of the Technical and Engineering Sector of Science Applications International Corporation (SAIC).

board_of_directors.name: Thomas Kennedy
board_of_directors.background: Former Executive Chairman and CEO of Raytheon Technologies Corporation. Former Chairman and CEO of Raytheon Company.

board_of_directors.name: Lionel Nowell III
board_of_directors.background: Retired Senior Vice President and Treasurer of PepsiCo, Inc. Former Lead Director of Bank of America Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Maria Sastre
board_of_directors.background: Former President and Chief Operating Officer of Signature Flight Support. Former Vice President, International Sales and Marketing of Royal Caribbean Cruises.
